data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the technical issue protocol.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the technical issue protocol related to lost connections during the exam. However, the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this protocol. While the linked use case mentions a connection loss and the candidate's ability to rejoin, it lacks concrete details or evidence of how this is managed within the system, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or processes confirming the technical issue protocol for lost connections.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the technical issue protocol.
